text:
You placed a limit order at 0.42 on Knicks ML and saw the line trade through that price without a fill. That's frustrating.

On a peer-to-peer exchange, your order only fills when another user wants to take the exact opposite side at your price. Even if the market moves through 0.42, there may not have been a counterparty willing to bet against you at that moment—or the volume at that price may have been claimed by other orders ahead of yours.

If you share the order ID, our ops team can review the order book activity and tell you what actually happened.

Novig Support
